summary: Iteration 11: Testing new 'Corrected Light-Induced HRV (Detrended)' feature. All backend tests pass (68/68) including 12 new tests for /api/light-hrv-detrended endpoint. Frontend UI fully verified - new section with LOESS-detrended HRV metrics, per-stim table, and three-panel visualization (Raw NN_70, Trend Extraction, Detrended Residual) all working correctly. Overlay mode toggle also functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend /api/light-hrv-detrended endpoint correctly implements LOESS smoothing algorithm
Frontend LightPanel.js correctly displays three-panel visualization with Panel A (Raw), Panel B (Trend), Panel C (Residual)
Overlay mode correctly combines raw and detrended signals on same chart with dual Y-axes
Per-pulse viz object correctly contains time_rel (seconds), nn_70, trend, and residual arrays
Final metrics are correctly computed as median across all valid pulses
context_for_next_testing_agent: New 'Corrected Light-Induced HRV (Detrended)' feature fully tested and working. Backend endpoint /api/light-hrv-detrended returns per_pulse data with visualization arrays (time_rel, nn_70, trend, residual) and detrended HRV metrics. Frontend displays three-panel visualization and overlay mode. All 68 backend tests pass.

features_verified.per_pulse_viz_data: ✅ viz object with time_rel, nn_70, trend, residual arrays
features_verified.final_metrics: ✅ Median of per_pulse values, n_pulses_valid count
features_verified.time_rel_in_seconds: ✅ time_rel array is in seconds, not minutes
features_verified.ui_corrected_hrv_section: ✅ New section appears below existing Light HRV
features_verified.ui_readout_metrics: ✅ ln(RMSSD₇₀) detrended, ln(SDNN₇₀) detrended, pNN50₇₀ detrended displayed
features_verified.ui_per_stim_table: ✅ Table with Stim, ln(RMSSD₇₀)_det, RMSSD₇₀_det, ln(SDNN₇₀)_det, SDNN₇₀_det, pNN50₇₀_det, Visualize
features_verified.ui_panel_b_trend: ✅ Panel B: Trend Extraction (LOESS overlay in amber)
features_verified.ui_panel_c_residual: ✅ Panel C: Detrended Residual (green line with zero reference)
features_verified.ui_overlay_mode: ✅ Toggle combines raw vs detrended on same chart
